title: Question Sets
subtitle: Build reusable screening question templates and attach them to job postings.
emptySubtitle: Create your first set to attach to job postings.

row.rankingHint: Candidates will drag these jobs into their preferred order (1 = top choice).
row.rankingTooFew: Add at least 2 jobs for ranking to be meaningful.

editor.desc: Build a reusable set of screening questions to attach to job postings.
editor.name: Set Name
editor.descriptionPh: Optional — describe when to use this set
editor.noneYet: No questions yet — click "Add Question" to start building.

delete.title: Delete Question Set?
delete.body: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. Jobs using this set will no longer have questions attached.
